setwd("/scratch/prj/mmg_holland_sandbox/Yanjing")

library(Biostrings)
library(JASPAR2020)
library(TFBSTools)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(seqLogo)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(readxl)
library(GenomicRanges)

fa_path <- "/scratch/prj/mmg_holland_sandbox/_genomes/mouse/GRCm38.p0/rdna/BK000964.3.looped.fasta"

#load modified rDNA sequence 
fa_genome <- readDNAStringSet(fa_path, use.names = TRUE)
fa_seq <- fa_genome[[1]]

#filters 
opts <- list()
opts[["species"]] <- 10090
opts[["collection"]] <- "CORE"        
#opts[["tax_group"]]  <- "vertebrates" 
#opts[["tf_class"]]   <- "Zinc finger" 
#opts[["name"]]       <- "CTCF"

pfmList <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2020, opts)
length(pfmList) #[1] 107 

pwmList <- toPWM(pfmList, type="log2probratio", pseudocounts=0.8,
             bg=c(A=0.25, C=0.25, G=0.25, T=0.25)) #default background settings

subject <- DNAString(fa_seq)
sitesetList <- searchSeq(pwmList, subject, seqname="modified_rDNA", min.score="75%", strand="+")

sitesetList_df <- as.data.frame(sitesetList)
write.table(sitesetList_df, "results_all_TFs.csv", col.names=TRUE)

for (tf in unique(sitesetList_df$TF)) {
  dir.create(file.path("/scratch/prj/mmg_holland_sandbox/Yanjing", tf), showWarnings = FALSE)
}

ids <- unique(sitesetList_df$ID)
base_dir <- "/scratch/prj/mmg_holland_sandbox/Yanjing"

snv <- read.table("/scratch/prj/mmg_holland_sandbox/Yanjing/supplementary_data/snv.csv", header = TRUE)
ref_pos <- snv$modified

snv_range <- GRanges(
  seqnames = "modified_rDNA",
  ranges   = IRanges(start = ref_pos, end = ref_pos),
  strand   = "+")

results_list <- list()
all_results  <- data.frame()

for (id in ids) {
  subset_df <- sitesetList_df[sitesetList_df$ID == id, ]
  tf_name   <- unique(subset_df$TF)
  seqs      <- subset_df$siteSeqs
  out_dir   <- file.path(base_dir, tf_name)

  hits_range              <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(subset_df, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)
  hits_range$snv_presence <- countOverlaps(hits_range, snv_range)
  snv_hits                <- hits_range[hits_range$snv_presence > 0]
  snv_range$overlap_count <- countOverlaps(snv_range, hits_range)
  snv_range$is_matched    <- countOverlaps(snv_range, hits_range) > 0
  snv_range$not_matched   <- countOverlaps(snv_range, hits_range) == 0
  
  #data for box plots
  results_list[[id]] <- data.frame(
    ID            = id,
    TF            = tf_name,
    total_hits    = length(hits_range),
    snv_hits      = length(snv_hits),
    snv_covered   = sum(snv_range$is_matched),
    snv_uncovered = sum(snv_range$not_matched),
    rate          = length(snv_hits) / length(hits_range)
  )

  #Rplot 1: seqlogo for TF-rDNA mappings at min.score = 75% 
  pfm_logo <- consensusMatrix(DNAStringSet(seqs))[c("A", "C", "G", "T"), ]
  p_logo   <- makePWM(prop.table(pfm_logo, margin = 2))
  pdf(file.path(out_dir, paste0(tf_name, "_", id, "_seqlogo.pdf")), width = 7, height = 5)
  seqLogo(p_logo)
  dev.off()

  #Rplot 2: rug plot
  p_rug <- ggplot(subset_df, aes(start - 3008)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 500) +
    geom_rug(data = data.frame(ref_pos), aes(x = ref_pos - 3008),
             sides = "b", colour = "red", alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(title = paste(tf_name, "Binding Sites"), x = "Position (kb)", y = "No. of Reads") +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-3, suffix = "k"), limits = c(-2300, 13500))
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0(tf_name, "_", id, "_rug_plot.pdf")), plot = p_rug, width = 8, height = 4)

  #Rplot 3 - bar plot 1: hits
  p_hits <- ggplot(data.frame(category = c("Total hits", "Hits containing SNVs"),
                               count    = c(nrow(subset_df), length(snv_hits))),
                   aes(x = factor(category, levels = category), y = count, fill = category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", colour = "darkgrey") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("skyblue", "salmon")) +
    labs(title = paste(tf_name, "binding sites in rDNA"), x = "", y = "Number of hits") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(legend.title = element_blank())
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0(tf_name, "_", id, "_bar_plot_hits.pdf")), plot = p_hits, width = 8, height = 8)

  #Rplot 4 - bar plot 2: SNV coverage
  p_snv <- ggplot(data.frame(category = c("Total", "Covered by hits", "Uncovered by hits"),
                              count    = c(88, sum(snv_range$is_matched), sum(snv_range$not_matched))),
                  aes(x = factor(category, levels = category), y = count, fill = category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", colour = "darkgrey") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("pink", "salmon", "skyblue")) +
    labs(title = paste("Mouse SNVs compared to", tf_name, "binding sites in rDNA"), x = "", y = "Number of SNVs") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(legend.title = element_blank())
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0(tf_name, "_", id, "_bar_plot_snv.pdf")), plot = p_snv, width = 8, height = 8)

  #pfm rates (WGS)
  pfm_id  <- getMatrixByID(JASPAR2020, ID = id)
  pfm_mat <- Matrix(pfm_id)
  colnames(pfm_mat) <- paste0("Pos", 1:ncol(pfm_mat))
  pfm_table <- rbind(as.data.frame(pfm_mat), Total = colSums(pfm_mat))
  write.table(pfm_table, file.path(out_dir, paste0(tf_name, "_", id, "_pfm_counts.csv")), col.names = TRUE)

  snv_covered <- as.data.frame(snv_range) %>% filter(is_matched == TRUE) %>% pull(start)

  #main results table
  results <- subset_df %>%
    mutate(base = strsplit(as.character(siteSeqs), ""),
           pos  = mapply(seq, start, end, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)) %>%
    unnest(c(base, pos)) %>%
    filter(pos %in% snv_covered) %>%
    left_join(as.data.frame(hits_range) %>% select(start, snv_presence), by = "start") %>%
    left_join(snv, by = c("pos" = "modified")) %>%
    rename(snv_modified = pos, snv_original = original) %>%
    select(seqnames, start, end, absScore, relScore, ID, TF, siteSeqs, base, #added base to confirm but should be the same 
           snv_presence, snv_modified, snv_original, target_base, alt_base, haplotype)

  if (nrow(results) == 0) {
    cat("Skipped (no SNV overlaps):", tf_name, id, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  totals <- as.numeric(pfm_table["Total", ])
  names(totals) <- 1:ncol(pfm_mat)

  df <- data.frame(
    TF           = tf_name,
    ID           = id,
    snv_original = results$snv_original,
    snv_modified = results$snv_modified,
    position_z   = results$snv_modified - results$start + 1,
    target_base  = results$target_base,
    alt_base     = results$alt_base,
    base         = results$base         
  )

  df$target_rate <- mapply(function(pos, base) {
    val <- pfm_mat[base, pos] / totals[pos]
    if (val == 0) "error" else val
  }, df$position_z, df$target_base)

  df$alt_rate <- mapply(function(pos, base) {
    val <- pfm_mat[base, pos] / totals[pos]
    if (val == 0) "intolerable" else val
  }, df$position_z, df$alt_base)

  df$diff <- suppressWarnings(
    as.numeric(ifelse(df$alt_rate    == "intolerable", NA, df$alt_rate)) -
    as.numeric(ifelse(df$target_rate == "error",       NA, df$target_rate))
  )

  write.table(df, file.path(out_dir, paste0(tf_name, "_", id, "_results_TFBSrate.csv")))
  all_results <- rbind(all_results, df)

  cat("Done:", tf_name, id, "\n")
}

all(all_results$base == all_results$target_base) #TRUE thus remove base
all_results$base <- NULL

summary_df <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
rownames(summary_df) <- NULL

write.table(summary_df,  "coverage_all_TFs.csv", col.names = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)
write.table(all_results, "all_TFs_results_TFBSrate.csv", col.names = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

all_results[all_results$TF == "Arnt", ] #width = 6 
#    TF       ID snv_original snv_modified position_z target_base alt_base
#1 Arnt MA0004.1        -1413         1596          5           T        C
#2 Arnt MA0004.1        -1282         1727          5           T        C
#3 Arnt MA0004.1          393         3401          3           C        T
#4 Arnt MA0004.1        12857        15865          6           G        C
#5 Arnt MA0004.1        13238        16246          6           G        A
#  target_rate    alt_rate diff
#1           1 intolerable   NA
#2           1 intolerable   NA
#3           1 intolerable   NA
#4           1 intolerable   NA
#5           1 intolerable   NA

df <- read.table("all_TFs_results_TFBSrate.csv", header = TRUE)
df[df$TF == "Lhx3", ] #double checked base = target_base not sure why 

#89 Lhx3 MA0135.1          413         3421          7           C        T    C
#90 Lhx3 MA0135.1          419         3427         13           G        T    G
#   target_rate    alt_rate diff
#89       error intolerable   NA
#90        0.15         0.3 0.15
